title: Self Destruct Keybind Renewed
description: Self destruct like in TF2 on press of a keybind.
body:
Updated the zany_zaynen's self destruct keybind mod to 1.19.4 and 1.20.1

Team Fortress 2 Inspired explode key bind, easy to use, use in modpack, where you want.

To Blow Up, Press The "B" Key~

Enjoy~
